response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven architectures. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of executive-level leadership, fintech infrastructure experience, or production-scale multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments, which are critical for this CTO role.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and microservices, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure at Naver.
Diverse technical background spanning backend, distributed systems, and real-time data processing, with hands-on work in high-scale environments.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating technical depth and problem-solving skills.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Limited evidence of fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, or regulatory compliance).
Agentic AI experience appears tangential (e.g., MCP code generators) rather than core production systems with financial stakes.
